---
title: "test_code_sentinel_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_code_sentinel_empire.py"
loc: 15
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.43
style_score: 3.72
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.27
---

## Intent
The `test_code_sentinel_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_heimdall_scan_orphans, test_heimdall_ignore_main. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_heimdall_scan_orphans, test_heimdall_ignore_main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.tools.code_sentinel](file://src.tools.code_sentinel)

### Exports
- `test_heimdall_scan_orphans`
- `test_heimdall_ignore_main`
